params.amount: The amount to add to the avatar balance

params.owner: The address that will own the avatar

returns.tokenId: The ID of the newly minted avatar NFT
The avatar token ID (0 if none)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.guard: The address of the CircuitGuard contract

returns._0: The total supply of avatar NFTs

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params.newRoot: The new cognitive state root hash

returns._0: True if the claimer is the avatar owner

createAvatar(address,bytes32,uint256).notice: Create a new AI Avatar NFT

getAvatarByOwner(address).notice: Get the avatar token ID for an owner address

setCircuitGuard(address).notice: Set the circuit guard contract address

totalSupply().notice: Get the total number of avatars minted

updateCognitionRoot(uint256,bytes32).notice: Update the cognition root of an avatar

updateResonanceScore(uint256,uint256).notice: Update the resonance score for an avatar

verifyCognitiveOwnership(uint256,address.notice: Verify cognitive ownership of an avatar
